mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dormitory (dormitory_number, dormitory_type, capacity, current_occupancy, building, status) VALUES (#{dormitoryNumber}, #{dormitoryType}, #{capacity}, #{currentOccupancy}, #{building}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE dormitory SET dormitory_number = #{dormitoryNumber}, dormitory_type = #{dormitoryType}, capacity = #{capacity}, current_occupancy = #{currentOccupancy}, building = #{building}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(capacity), 0) as totalCapacity, COALESCE(SUM(current_occupancy), 0) as totalOccupied FROM dormitory WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dormitory WHERE status = 0
